---
title: ""
toc: false
listing:
  - id: current-members
    type: grid
    categories: unnumbered
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, categories, title]
    contents: 
    - people/current-members/*.qmd
    - path: https://camilogarciabotero.github.io
      title: "Camilo García-Botero"
      categories: [PhD]
      image: people/people-images/camilo-garcia.jpeg
  - id: alumni
    contents: "people/alumni/*.qmd"
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, started, ended]
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Name"
      subtitle: "Role"
      started: "Started"
      ended: "Ended"
---

## Current Members

:::{#current-members}
:::

## Alumni

:::{#alumni}
:::
